method_summary: POLARIS is a modular orchestration framework for back-office automation that treats the process as planning over typed agents, using a Chain-of-Action planner for type-checked DAGs, a rubric-based selector for policy-aware selection, and guarded execution with validators and compiled policy checks.
key_innovation: The key innovation is treating back-office automation as planning over typed agents with type-sound composition, policy-aware rubric-based selection, and validator-gated execution that prevents external side effects before validation.
title: POLARIS: Typed Planning and Governed Execution for Agentic AI in Back-Office Automation
